rewritten_requirements: The system shall determine whether any sensors are open.
The system shall set the status attribute to ‘not ready’ if sensors are open.
The system shall work in collaboration with Sensor.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: ControlPanel must determine whether any sensors are open.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: As part of the activation procedure, the ControlPanel object must determine whether any sensors are open.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If sensors are open, ControlPanel must set a status attribute to “not ready.”
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A responsibility named determine-sensor-status() is defined. If sensors are open, ControlPanel must set a status attribute to “not ready.”

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: ControlPanel works in collaboration with Sensor.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Therefore, the responsibility determinesensor-status() can be fulfilled only if ControlPanel works in collaboration with Sensor.
